name: dtr-direc-tec-raf
description: Monorepo padre: tag-mule (orquestador IA) + tureparto (WhatsApp + cliente IA)

scripts.install: echo 'No dependencies to install. Use docker compose build to build the services.'
scripts.pull-models: docker compose exec ollama ollama pull qwen2.5:3b && docker compose exec ollama ollama pull nomic-embed-text
scripts.test-enrich: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/enrich -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"source":"tureparto","item_id":"test-1","text":"Mensaje de prueba","existing_tags":[]}' | python3 -m json.tool
